Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: metal-cutting and -grinding tools [300162866], equipment for metal-cutting and -grinding [300023221], metalworking equipment [300162819], equipment by material processed [300168082], equipment [300122241], Tools and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300022238], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Hard stones used for sharpening edged tools.

Source.Source_ID: 2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Harde stenen die worden gebruikt om snijgereedschap te slijpen.
Harter Stein, der für das Schleifen von Schneidwerkzeugen verwendet wird.
用以磨利工具邊刃之硬石。

Source.Source_ID: 2000026701/Mayer, Dictionary of Art Terms and Techniques (1969)
